content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Fixed resolve_final_review_panel_for_preflight in engine.rs to delegate to resolve_final_review_panel() instead of independently resolving planner/arbiter via generic role targets and overwriting the correctly-resolved panel values. The infrastructure for final_review_planner_backend (config surface, policy resolution, diagnostics, snapshots, drift detection) was already fully implemented; the only bug was the preflight function bypassing the dedicated config by using resolve_role_target(BackendPolicyRole::Planner) and then overwriting panel.planner. Added a fallback-path test verifying backward compatibility when final_review.planner_backend is unset.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Explored codebase to understand existing final_review_planner_backend infrastructure: config surface in domain.rs FinalReviewSettings, effective policy in EffectiveBackendPolicy, resolution in BackendPolicyService::resolve_final_review_planner_target(), diagnostics methods, snapshot persistence, and drift detection - all already implemented correctly
1. [Completed] Identified the bug in resolve_final_review_panel_for_preflight (engine.rs:373-399): resolves planner/arbiter via generic resolve_role_target() then overwrites the correctly-resolved values from resolve_final_review_panel(), bypassing the dedicated final_review.planner_backend and final_review.arbiter_backend config
2. [Completed] Fixed resolve_final_review_panel_for_preflight to delegate directly to policy.resolve_final_review_panel(cycle) which honours the dedicated overrides, removing the redundant generic resolution and overwrite (engine.rs:373-385)
3. [Completed] Added test final_review_planner_falls_back_to_workflow_planner_when_unset in backend_policy_test.rs verifying backward-compatible fallback when final_review.planner_backend is not set
4. [Completed] Validated: all 757 tests pass, no new clippy warnings, formatting clean (cargo test && cargo clippy && cargo fmt --check)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 757 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored
- cargo test final_review_planner: 7 targeted tests pass including new fallback test and existing override/diagnostics tests
- cargo clippy: no new warnings in changed files (pre-existing warnings in unrelated files only)
- cargo fmt --check: clean
- Existing test final_review_planner_override_does_not_eagerly_require_workflow_planner confirms explicit override is respected at policy layer
- New test final_review_planner_falls_back_to_workflow_planner_when_unset confirms backward-compatible fallback
- Conformance tests parity_slice0_final_review_planner_in_snapshot and parity_slice0_final_review_planner_drift_detected continue passing

## Outstanding Risks

- The analogous resolve_prompt_review_panel_for_preflight function has the same structural pattern (resolves refiner generically then overwrites panel value) which may have the same issue if prompt_review.refiner_backend override is configured - not in scope for this bead but worth noting
